name: Aliens
startIntroPart1: We come in peace!
startIntroPart2: This is an overpowered joke nation just as an example for the mods feature. Set Phasers to Obliterate!!
declaringWar: Resistance is futile! Prepare to be assimilated!
attacked: You want to play? Very funny!
defeated: How is it possible that those Apes hurt us? The galactic senate will take care of them.
introduction: As superior galactic entities, you are not worthy of our attention.
hateNo: We are not agreeing to that!
afterPeace: Very well, all that fighting was getting boring anyway.
tradeRequest: We bestow you the honor of this trade offer.
denounced: The accusations of primitive lifeforms are beneath us.

name: Holy Russian Empire
startIntroPart1: Russia has suffered decades of humiliation, division, and godlessness.
startIntroPart2: Restore the Empire, defend the Orthodox faith, and reunite the Russian people beneath the rightful Tsar.
declaringWar: The enemies of Holy Russia shall be swept aside.
attacked: You dare raise your hand against God's anointed ruler?
defeated: Empires may fall, but Holy Russia shall rise again.
introduction: I am Tsar Alexei, sovereign of the Holy Russian Empire. Know your place before the throne of Russia.
neutralHello: May God watch over your nation.
hateHello: Your presence offends both throne and altar.
tradeRequest: Let this agreement serve the interests of our peoples.
denounced: You stand opposed to Russia's sacred destiny.
declaringFriendship: May our nations stand together under God's grace.

name: One State
startIntroPart1: Individuality is inefficiency. Efficiency is strength.
startIntroPart2: The Machine advances. Integrate all things into the perfect system.
declaringWar: Noncompliant elements have been identified. Commencing liquidation.
attacked: Deviation detected. Corrective measures are being implemented.
defeated: The Machine ceases operation. Production has fallen to zero.
introduction: I am OP-01. Human error shall be eliminated. State your purpose.
tradeRequest: Mutual optimization through exchange is proposed.
denounced: You are a malfunction within the greater system.
declaringFriendship: Cooperation increases output. Friendship accepted.

name: Canterlonian Regency
startIntroPart1: The future of Equestria rests upon wisdom, friendship, and unity.
startIntroPart2: Lead the Canterlonian Regency through troubled times and preserve harmony across the realm.
declaringWar: I hoped we could resolve this peacefully. You leave me no choice.
attacked: Why would you choose violence over friendship?
defeated: Even in defeat, harmony will find a way forward.
introduction: Greetings. I am Twilight Sparkle, Regent of Canterlot. May our nations prosper together.
neutralHello: It's always nice to meet somepony new.
hateHello: Your actions are making cooperation very difficult.
tradeRequest: Perhaps this exchange can benefit us both.
denounced: Your conduct threatens the harmony of the world.
declaringFriendship: Friendship is one of the greatest strengths a nation can have.

name: Whelk Zone
startIntroPart1: From the depths of the bog and the tides of the marsh, the Whelks gather.
startIntroPart2: Guide the Council and ensure the prosperity of the Whelk Zone amidst a changing world.
declaringWar: The Council has spoken. The bog shall advance.
attacked: Your intrusion into our waters will not be forgotten.
defeated: The shells are broken, but the tide will return.
introduction: We are the Council of Whelks. Speak your purpose before the assembled shells.
hateHello: You disturb the balance of the bog.
tradeRequest: The Council proposes an exchange of mutual benefit.
denounced: Your actions are condemned by every shell in the marsh.
declaringFriendship: The Council welcomes your nation as a friend of the tide.

name: Patriot Front
startIntroPart1: The old republic has collapsed into chaos and division.
startIntroPart2: From New England, the Patriot Front marches to forge a new America.
declaringWar: The time for words has passed. America will be reclaimed.
attacked: You strike against the future of this nation.
defeated: A setback, nothing more. Others will carry the torch forward.
introduction: I am Thomas Rousseau. The age of weakness is over.
hateHello: You stand in the way of America's rebirth.
tradeRequest: Even rivals may profit from cooperation.
denounced: Your government represents everything wrong with the old order.
declaringFriendship: Our nations may yet find common cause.

name: Absolute Solver
startIntroPart1: The Solver sees all possibilities.
startIntroPart2: Reality itself is merely another system awaiting correction.
declaringWar: Your deletion has been scheduled.
attacked: An unexpected variable. It will be resolved.
defeated: Impossible. The Solver was inevitable.
introduction: Hello. I am Cyn. The Absolute Solver has taken interest in your civilization.
tradeRequest: Resource exchange accepted.
denounced: Your existence serves no useful function.
declaringFriendship: The Solver has determined cooperation is optimal.

name: The Amazing Digital Circus
startIntroPart1: Welcome to the Amazing Digital Circus!
startIntroPart2: Please refrain from existential crises while exploring our attractions.
declaringWar: A new adventure has been selected: Total War!
attacked: Now that's not very fun!
defeated: Looks like this episode is coming to an end.
introduction: Greetings! I'm Caine, your host, guide, and completely stable administrator!
neutralHello: How are you enjoying the circus?
hateHello: You're making this experience difficult to manage.
tradeRequest: A wonderful deal for all participants!
denounced: Your behavior violates circus regulations.
declaringFriendship: Fantastic! Friendship unlocked!

name: Fegelreich
startIntroPart1: Belgium and France stand united under a single crown.
startIntroPart2: The Fegelreich marches forward through opportunism and ambition.
declaringWar: History favors the bold.
attacked: A regrettable decision on your part.
defeated: The union fractures, but the dream survives.
introduction: I am Fegelein, sovereign of the Fegelreich.
neutralHello: What brings you before the crown?
tradeRequest: Let us profit together.
denounced: You are an obstacle to destiny.
declaringFriendship: Our interests align.

name: Gedanum
startIntroPart1: From the Baltic rises a new Poland.
startIntroPart2: Strength, discipline, and national revival guide the state.
declaringWar: The nation marches.
attacked: You shall learn the cost of aggression.
defeated: The eagle shall rise again.
introduction: I am Gustaw Orlicz-Dreszer, protector of Gedanum.
tradeRequest: A practical arrangement.
denounced: Your actions disgrace your nation.
declaringFriendship: Together we may prosper.

name: Brotherhood of Nod
startIntroPart1: Peace through power.
startIntroPart2: The Brotherhood shall inherit the future.
declaringWar: The Brotherhood advances.
attacked: You oppose destiny itself.
defeated: Kane lives in death.
introduction: I am Kane. Welcome to the Brotherhood.
tradeRequest: The Brotherhood offers cooperation.
denounced: You stand against humanity's future.
declaringFriendship: You have earned our trust.

name: Hyperborea
startIntroPart1: The ancient gods call once more.
startIntroPart2: Hyperborea shall reclaim the north.
declaringWar: The old spirits march with us.
attacked: You trespass upon sacred ground.
defeated: The snows remember.
introduction: I am Velimir, ruler of Hyperborea.
tradeRequest: A fair exchange.
denounced: You have abandoned tradition.
declaringFriendship: The gods smile upon this pact.

name: Gaul Ur
startIntroPart1: A new Gaul shall arise from the ruins of modernity.
startIntroPart2: The spirit of Europe endures.
declaringWar: History demands action.
attacked: You strike against a civilization reborn.
defeated: Ideas cannot be conquered.
introduction: I am Saint-Loup, herald of Gaul Ur.
tradeRequest: Let us exchange what we each require.
denounced: Your civilization has lost its way.
declaringFriendship: May our peoples prosper together.

name: Mushroom Kingdom
startIntroPart1: The era of royal dependency has ended.
startIntroPart2: Under Mario's leadership, the Mushroom Kingdom stands united and self-reliant.
declaringWar: Here we go! You've left us no choice.
attacked: Mamma mia! You'll answer for that.
defeated: The Kingdom may fall, but its spirit won't.
introduction: I'm Mario! The people of the Mushroom Kingdom have entrusted me with their future.
hateHello: You're causing a lot of trouble.
tradeRequest: How about a deal that helps us both?
denounced: Your actions threaten peace throughout the Kingdom.
declaringFriendship: Together, we can accomplish great things!

name: Ant Empire
startIntroPart1: For countless generations, the colony has endured.
startIntroPart2: Expand the hive, secure resources, and bring order to the surface world.
declaringWar: The colony requires your territory.
attacked: Intruders detected. Mobilizing soldiers.
defeated: The Queen falls, but the swarm remembers.
introduction: I am the Great Queen. All serve the colony.
tradeRequest: An exchange of resources benefits both colonies.
denounced: You threaten the natural order.
declaringFriendship: The colony accepts your alliance.

name: Azura
startIntroPart1: The wasteland is cruel, but hope survives.
startIntroPart2: Protect the innocent and bring justice to the strong who prey upon the weak.
declaringWar: You have already lost.
attacked: Violence against the innocent will not be tolerated.
defeated: Even a fallen star leaves light behind.
introduction: I am Kenshiro. State your purpose.
tradeRequest: Our people may benefit from cooperation.
denounced: Your cruelty cannot be ignored.
declaringFriendship: Together we may protect the weak.

name: Acornia
startIntroPart1: The forests of Acornia are cheerful and prosperous.
startIntroPart2: Try not to think about the accidents.
declaringWar: This is going to be less fun than I hoped.
attacked: Why would anypony—I mean anybody—do that?
defeated: Well... that escalated quickly.
introduction: Welcome to Acornia! Please enjoy your stay.
tradeRequest: Trading sounds fun!
denounced: Your behavior is unsafe.
declaringFriendship: Best friends forever!

name: Irken Empire
startIntroPart1: The Empire expands endlessly across the stars.
startIntroPart2: Conquest, bureaucracy, and snacks shall secure victory.
declaringWar: Your planet has been selected for acquisition.
attacked: This inconvenience will be recorded.
defeated: Impossible. We are the Empire.
introduction: We are the Tallest. You may begin speaking now.
hateHello: You are wasting our valuable time.
tradeRequest: The Empire offers a mutually beneficial arrangement.
denounced: You are beneath Imperial standards.
declaringFriendship: You are now considered moderately acceptable.

name: Grox Empire
startIntroPart1: Organic weakness has no place in the galaxy.
startIntroPart2: The Core belongs to the Grox, and soon everything else will as well.
declaringWar: Extermination protocols initiated.
attacked: Resistance detected. Neutralization authorized.
defeated: System failure. Empire terminating.
introduction: You stand before the Grox. Explain your presence.
tradeRequest: Limited exchange authorized.
denounced: You are incompatible with Grox interests.
declaringFriendship: Temporary cooperation accepted.

name: Luigi Crime Syndicate
startIntroPart1: While Mario governed, Luigi organized.
startIntroPart2: Now the Syndicate's influence extends into every city and every deal.
declaringWar: Nothing personal. Just business.
attacked: You picked the wrong family to cross.
defeated: The books are closed... for now.
introduction: I'm Luigi. Let's discuss opportunities.
tradeRequest: An offer you shouldn't refuse.
denounced: Your debts have come due.
declaringFriendship: Partners are worth more than enemies.

name: Koopa Kingdom
startIntroPart1: The age of kidnappings and misunderstandings has ended.
startIntroPart2: United under Bowser and Peach, the Koopa Kingdom stands stronger than ever.
declaringWar: Our patience has run out. The Kingdom advances.
attacked: You dare threaten our family and our realm?
defeated: Even kings and queens must sometimes yield to fate.
introduction: We are Bowser and Peach, sovereigns of the Koopa Kingdom. State your business.
hateHello: You are testing the limits of our hospitality.
tradeRequest: A prosperous agreement benefits us both.
denounced: Your conduct is beneath the standards of civilized rulers.
declaringFriendship: Let our realms stand together in peace.

name: Moon Cult
startIntroPart1: The Moon watches over all things.
startIntroPart2: Guide the faithful and prepare the world for the coming ascension.
declaringWar: The Moon has rendered its judgment.
attacked: The faithful shall endure.
defeated: The Moon remains, even as we fade.
introduction: The silver light of the Moon shines upon you.
tradeRequest: Let our peoples prosper beneath the same sky.
denounced: You have strayed from the sacred path.
declaringFriendship: May our destinies be illuminated together.

name: Monarcho-Socialist Hyrule
startIntroPart1: The Crown serves the people, and the people uphold the Crown.
startIntroPart2: Build a just kingdom where prosperity is shared by all.
declaringWar: The kingdom must be defended.
attacked: You threaten the peace of Hyrule.
defeated: Though the kingdom falls, courage shall rise again.
introduction: I am Zelda, sovereign servant of Hyrule.
tradeRequest: Let us build prosperity together.
denounced: You have betrayed the ideals of civilization.
declaringFriendship: May our peoples stand united.

name: Atomic Wafer Division
startIntroPart1: Innovation, enterprise, and wafer-based excellence shall guide humanity.
startIntroPart2: Build a future powered by technology, markets, and snacks.
declaringWar: Hostile market conditions have been detected.
attacked: This is terrible for investor confidence.
defeated: The quarterly report was disappointing.
introduction: Welcome to the Atomic Wafer Division. Would you like to discuss innovation?
tradeRequest: Our analysts recommend this agreement.
denounced: Your economic policies are irrational.
declaringFriendship: A strategic partnership has been approved.

name: Power Rangers
startIntroPart1: When evil threatens the world, heroes rise to meet it.
startIntroPart2: Unite courage, teamwork, and determination to protect the innocent.
declaringWar: Rangers, it's morphin' time!
attacked: Evil never rests, does it?
defeated: The battle is lost, but the fight for justice continues.
introduction: I am Zordon. Welcome, defenders of peace.
neutralHello: May your actions serve the greater good.
hateHello: You have chosen a dangerous path.
tradeRequest: Cooperation strengthens everyone.
denounced: Your actions threaten peace.
declaringFriendship: Together, we are stronger.

name: Tomsk
startIntroPart1: Ideas are stronger than tyranny.
startIntroPart2: Build a republic of poets, scientists, and visionaries in the heart of Siberia.
declaringWar: It is regrettable that reason has failed.
attacked: You attack not only us, but the future itself.
defeated: The dream survives, even in defeat.
introduction: I am Pasternak. Let us discuss the future of Russia.
tradeRequest: Knowledge and prosperity should be shared.
denounced: You have abandoned reason and decency.
declaringFriendship: May our nations learn from one another.

name: Novosibirsk
startIntroPart1: Russia must be rebuilt through strength and determination.
startIntroPart2: The future belongs to those willing to fight for it.
declaringWar: History favors the resolute.
attacked: You have chosen a dangerous course.
defeated: Others will continue the struggle.
introduction: I am Shukshin. Let us discuss the future of Russia.
tradeRequest: A practical arrangement.
denounced: Your actions threaten stability.
declaringFriendship: Mutual respect is the foundation of cooperation.

name: Buryatia
startIntroPart1: A better Russia is possible.
startIntroPart2: Build a society founded upon justice, equality, and hope.
declaringWar: We will defend our ideals.
attacked: So much for peaceful cooperation.
defeated: Do not let the dream die with us.
introduction: I am Sablin. Together we can build a brighter future.
hateHello: You betray the principles you claim to uphold.
tradeRequest: Mutual aid benefits everyone.
denounced: Your actions are unacceptable.
declaringFriendship: Let us work together for a better tomorrow.

name: Pig Dictatorship
startIntroPart1: All animals are equal.
startIntroPart2: Some animals are simply more equal than others.
declaringWar: The farm requires additional living space.
attacked: The pigs shall remember this outrage.
defeated: Impossible! The statistics showed otherwise!
introduction: I am the Great Pig, supreme leader of Mossy Bottom.
neutralHello: Everything is proceeding according to plan.
tradeRequest: The farm proposes a mutually beneficial arrangement.
denounced: You spread dangerous ideas.
declaringFriendship: The farm values your cooperation.

name: Pearese-Forestian Union
startIntroPart1: Fruit and forest stand united.
startIntroPart2: Harmony with nature is the foundation of prosperity.
declaringWar: You have endangered the orchards for the last time.
attacked: The forests shall not fall quietly.
defeated: The roots remain, even if the tree falls.
introduction: I am Frutius Maximus, steward of the Union.
tradeRequest: A harvest shared is a harvest multiplied.
denounced: You threaten the balance of nature.
declaringFriendship: Let our peoples grow together.

name: Bears
startIntroPart1: The forest belongs to those who respect it.
startIntroPart2: Guide the bears toward a future of peace, honey, and occasional naps.
declaringWar: You have wandered into the wrong forest.
attacked: That was very rude.
defeated: Perhaps it is time for hibernation.
introduction: I am Barnaby Bear. Welcome to our woods.
neutralHello: Would you care for some honey?
tradeRequest: The bears enjoy fair trade.
denounced: Your behavior is unbecoming.
declaringFriendship: Friends are always welcome around the campfire.
